member.name: T:AddressBookQuery
member.summary: Query the mirror node for the address book.

member.name: P:AddressBookQuery.FileId
member.summary: Assign the file id of address book to retrieve.

member.name: T:AddressBookQuery_2
member.summary: Assign the maximum backoff duration. Must be at least 500 ms.

member.name: P:AddressBookQuery.Limit
member.summary: Assign the number of node addresses to retrieve, or 0 for all nodes.

member.name: P:AddressBookQuery.MaxAttempts
member.summary: Assign the maximum number of attempts.

member.name: M:AddressBookQuery.Execute(Client)
member.summary: Execute the query with the client's preset timeout.

member.name: M:AddressBookQuery.Execute(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute the query with a user-supplied timeout.

member.name: M:AddressBookQuery.ExecuteAsync(Client)
member.summary: Execute the query asynchronously with the client's preset timeout.

member.name: M:AddressBookQuery.ExecuteAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute the query asynchronously with a user-supplied timeout.

member.name: M:AddressBookQuery.BuildProtoQuery
member.summary: Build the protobuf address book query message.
